creator: niels@kobschaetzki.net
text:
There are now two commits that address the bug. I tested only the one to appendfile.c (without the extras in exim.c) and have it working production.

Commit relating to appendfile: b4e7527561f1c68b821d5cf25efe29ae63d1d434
https://github.com/Exim/exim/commit/b4e7527561f1c68b821d5cf25efe29ae63d1d434
